items.title: Abdala
items.formationText: Open line or broken circle of mixed dancers facing centre; hands in W-hold.

items.title: Aalistullaa
items.formationText: Couples in closed position facing line of dance, arranged around the room.

items.title: Mayim Mayim
items.formationText: Circle of dancers facing centre; hands joined in W-hold.

items.title: Haire Mamougeh
items.formationText: Open line of dancers facing centre or slightly to the right; hands in W-hold or shoulder hold as described by the teacher.

items.title: Çobankat
items.formationText: Open line of dancers facing centre; hands in W-hold.

items.title: M2 Conversion acquired_sources_nonwiki orchesography-art-of-dancing
items.sourceTitle: Orchesography, or, the Art of Dancing
